raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "A group of 78 volunteers removed over 2,500 pounds of debris from the Santa Ana-Delhi channel in just two hours.",
    "This amount of trash collected is the most at a single cleanup in OC Coastkeeper’s 23-year history.",
    "Keeping river channels clean and trash-free is vital to protecting local wetlands and estuaries.",
    "Orange County waterways collect trash from inland communities via the county’s rivers and storm drains.",
    "If not intercepted, pollution from trash impacts oceans and shorelines.",
    "Community cleanups are one of the best ways for the public to help prevent debris from polluting the sea."
  ]
}
```
